channel.title: Reverse Mortgage Guide
channel.description: Comprehensive and clear reverse mortgage cost comparisons and guides for seniors.

item.title: The 5 Most Common Reasons Reverse Mortgages Are Denied
item.description: Don't waste money on an appraisal until you know the top reasons FHA underwriters reject senior borrowers.

item.title: Can a Non-US Citizen Get a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: Understand the residency and citizenship requirements for securing an FHA-insured Home Equity Conversion Mortgage.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages and the Power of Attorney
item.description: Can you use a Power of Attorney to take out a reverse mortgage for a parent with dementia? Learn the strict FHA rules.

item.title: Getting a Reverse Mortgage if You Don't Have a Will
item.description: Why taking out a reverse mortgage without an estate plan is a recipe for disaster for your surviving family members.

item.title: How to Report a Predatory Reverse Mortgage Lender
item.description: If you are being harassed, lied to, or pressured by a reverse mortgage loan officer, here is exactly who you need to call.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages for Veterans: Are There Special VA Benefits?
item.description: Does the VA offer a reverse mortgage? Learn the truth about veteran benefits and home equity loans.

item.title: The HECM for Purchase Program Explained
item.description: How to buy a brand new house using a reverse mortgage, cutting out traditional mortgage payments entirely.

item.title: Can You Use a Reverse Mortgage to Buy a Second Home?
item.description: Learn the legal loopholes and FHA rules regarding using reverse mortgage cash to purchase vacation properties.

item.title: The 'Free House' Seminar Pitch: What to Watch Out For
item.description: Why you should be highly skeptical of free lunch seminars promising that you can live rent-free forever with no consequences.

item.title: Spotting Reverse Mortgage Contractor Scams
item.description: How shady home repair contractors trick seniors into taking out reverse mortgages to fund overpriced renovations.

item.title: Can You Pay Down the Principal on a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: Learn how making voluntary payments on a reverse mortgage works, and how it dramatically increases your line of credit.

item.title: LIBOR vs. SOFR: The New Reverse Mortgage Index
item.description: Why the reverse mortgage industry was forced to abandon the LIBOR index and transition to the SOFR index.

item.title: How the Margin Affects Your Adjustable Rate
item.description: Understand the difference between the Index and the Margin, and how to negotiate the lender's profit.

item.title: The Truth About the 'Non-Recourse' Guarantee
item.description: How the non-recourse clause protects your heirs from inheriting a massive reverse mortgage debt.

item.title: Fixed vs. Adjustable Interest Rates on Reverse Mortgages
item.description: Why 90% of reverse mortgages use adjustable rates, and the severe limitations of choosing a fixed rate.

item.title: Can You Change Your Reverse Mortgage Payment Plan Later?
item.description: Did you know you can switch from a Line of Credit to monthly Tenure checks at any time? Learn how the FHA allows ultimate flexibility.

item.title: Term Payments: Getting Higher Monthly Checks for a Shorter Time
item.description: If you only need income for a few years before downsizing, a Term payment plan offers massive monthly payouts.

item.title: Tenure Payments: Guaranteed Income for Life
item.description: How to convert your home equity into a guaranteed, tax-free monthly paycheck that lasts as long as you live.

item.title: How the HECM Line of Credit Growth Rate Works
item.description: Unlock the mathematical superpower of the FHA reverse mortgage: the guaranteed growth rate on unused funds.

item.title: Lump Sum vs. Line of Credit: Which is Safer?
item.description: Compare the two most popular ways to receive reverse mortgage cash and learn which option protects your equity.

item.title: Forced Placed Insurance: Why You Must Never Let It Happen
item.description: The catastrophic financial penalty you face if you allow your homeowners insurance to lapse on a reverse mortgage.

item.title: What Happens if Your Home is Destroyed by a Natural Disaster?
item.description: How a reverse mortgage is handled if your home burns down or is destroyed by a hurricane.

item.title: How HOA Dues Impact Your Reverse Mortgage Approval
item.description: Why a high monthly Homeowners Association fee can destroy your ability to pass the FHA Financial Assessment.

item.title: Surviving a Reverse Mortgage Foreclosure
item.description: What to do when you receive a Notice of Default on a reverse mortgage, and how to save your home.

item.title: The Financial Assessment: Residual Income Requirements
item.description: Unlike traditional mortgages that use DTI, reverse mortgages use Residual Income to determine if you qualify.

item.title: Can You Get a Reverse Mortgage with Bad Credit?
item.description: How the FHA Financial Assessment evaluates poor credit scores, bankruptcies, and missed payments.

item.title: Why Your Home Must Be Your Primary Residence
item.description: The absolute golden rule of reverse mortgages: you must live in the home for the majority of the year.

item.title: How Lenders Enforce the Home Maintenance Clause
item.description: You are required to maintain your home to FHA standards. Learn how lenders monitor your property condition.

item.title: What Happens if You Miss a Property Tax Payment?
item.description: Missing a property tax payment is the number one cause of reverse mortgage foreclosures. Here is the exact timeline of what happens.

item.title: The 62-Year-Old Age Requirement Explained
item.description: Why the FHA strictly enforces the age 62 requirement for reverse mortgages, and how it impacts younger spouses.

item.title: Shared Equity Agreements: Pros and Cons
item.description: A deep dive into how Shared Equity Agreements differ from reverse mortgages, and the hidden dangers of the contract.

item.title: Life Settlement: Selling Your Life Insurance Instead of Your Home
item.description: Did you know you can sell your life insurance policy for cash? Explore this alternative to taking out a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Renting Out Your Home and Moving to a Cheaper State
item.description: A radical but highly effective alternative to a reverse mortgage: geographical arbitrage and passive income.

item.title: State Property Tax Deferral Programs for Seniors
item.description: How to pause your property taxes using state-sponsored deferral programs instead of taking out a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Personal Unsecured Loans vs. Reverse Mortgages
item.description: Why a high-interest personal loan might actually be a better choice for small, short-term cash needs.

item.title: Selling Fractional Home Equity to Wall Street Investors
item.description: Understand the new industry of Home Equity Sharing Agreements and why they are riskier than reverse mortgages.

item.title: Intra-Family Loans: Borrowing From Your Adult Children
item.description: How to structure a legal, tax-compliant loan from your heirs instead of using a bank for a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Downsizing: The Hidden Costs of Selling and Moving
item.description: Before you sell your home to avoid a reverse mortgage, calculate the massive transactional costs of downsizing.

item.title: HELOC (Home Equity Line of Credit) vs. Reverse Mortgage
item.description: Understand the massive risks of a HELOC resetting after 10 years compared to the safety of a HECM line of credit.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage vs. Cash-Out Refinance: Which is Better?
item.description: Compare the strict monthly payments of a cash-out refinance against the compounding interest of a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Recording Fees and Mortgage Taxes by State
item.description: Learn about the unavoidable government fees and taxes required to legally record a reverse mortgage at the county courthouse.

item.title: Flood Certification and Hazard Insurance Requirements
item.description: Understand the strict insurance rules the FHA enforces to protect the collateral securing your reverse mortgage.

item.title: What is a 'Lender Credit' on a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: A lender credit can wipe out thousands in closing costs, but it comes at a steep price: a higher interest rate.

item.title: Understanding the Monthly Servicing Fee
item.description: Some reverse mortgages charge a monthly servicing fee. Learn what it covers and why many lenders now waive it.

item.title: Why Reverse Mortgage Appraisals Cost More Than Traditional Ones
item.description: Understand why FHA HECM appraisers charge a premium and why they are incredibly strict regarding home repairs.

item.title: Can Closing Costs Be Rolled Into the Reverse Mortgage Balance?
item.description: Discover how seniors pay for $15,000+ in reverse mortgage closing costs without actually writing a check.

item.title: The Cost of Independent HUD Counseling (and Fee Waivers)
item.description: Mandatory HUD counseling prevents predatory lending, but it isn't free. Learn what it costs and how to get a waiver.

item.title: Who Pays for Title Insurance on a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: Why you must purchase a new Lender's Title Insurance policy when getting a reverse mortgage.

item.title: How to Negotiate Reverse Mortgage Origination Fees
item.description: Lender origination fees are capped by law, but they are still negotiable. Learn how to get the lender to lower their fees.

item.title: Breaking Down the FHA Initial Mortgage Insurance Premium (IMIP)
item.description: Understand the largest closing cost associated with a reverse mortgage: the 2% FHA Initial Mortgage Insurance Premium.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage vs. Sale-Leaseback Agreements
item.description: Compare a standard reverse mortgage to residential sale-leaseback programs, exploring the risks of selling your home to an investor.

item.title: How to Cancel a Reverse Mortgage Application (Rescission Period)
item.description: Understand your legal right to back out of a reverse mortgage, including the mandatory 3-day right of rescission.

item.title: What is a Set-Aside for Property Repairs (Repair Rider)?
item.description: Learn what happens when an FHA appraiser requires mandatory repairs before your reverse mortgage can close.

item.title: Can You Get a Reverse Mortgage on a Home with Solar Panels?
item.description: Understand how leased vs. owned solar panels affect your home appraisal and reverse mortgage approval.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages in Arizona: Snowbird Occupancy Rules
item.description: How the FHA primary residence rules apply to snowbirds who split their time between Arizona and a northern state.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages in New York: Co-Op Laws Explained
item.description: An overview of the legal landscape for obtaining a reverse mortgage on a housing cooperative (co-op) in New York State.

item.title: Jumbo Reverse Mortgages: Pros and Cons for High-Value Homes
item.description: If your home is worth more than $1.14 million, learn why a proprietary Jumbo reverse mortgage might be a better fit than a HECM.

item.title: FHA Condo Approval Secrets for Reverse Mortgages
item.description: How to get a reverse mortgage if you live in a condominium, including FHA project approval and Spot Approvals.

item.title: Can You Get a Reverse Mortgage on a Manufactured Home?
item.description: Learn the strict FHA guidelines for securing a reverse mortgage on a manufactured or mobile home.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages for Multi-Family Homes (Duplex, Triplex)
item.description: Discover how you can use a reverse mortgage to access equity in a 2-to-4 unit multi-family property.

item.title: Do Reverse Mortgages Require You to Include Adult Children on the Deed?
item.description: We debunk the myth that you must add your children to the title of your home to get a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Can You Rent Out a Room if You Have a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: Learn the FHA rules regarding rental income, boarders, and renting out portions of a reverse mortgaged home.

item.title: Leaving a Reverse Mortgaged Home to Charity
item.description: Can you bequeath a home with a reverse mortgage to a non-profit organization or church? Here is what you need to know.

item.title: What Happens to Your Reverse Mortgage if You Move to a Nursing Home?
item.description: Understand the 12-month FHA rule regarding temporary medical absences and when your loan becomes Due and Payable.

item.title: Using a Reverse Mortgage to Fund Long-Term Care for a Spouse
item.description: Can you use home equity to pay for in-home care or a nursing facility for an ailing spouse? Yes, but there are risks.

item.title: Does a Reverse Mortgage Affect Medicaid Estate Recovery?
item.description: Learn how the Medicaid Estate Recovery Program (MERP) interacts with a reverse mortgage after a senior passes away.

item.title: Non-Borrowing Spouse Rights in a Divorce
item.description: What happens if a couple gets divorced when one spouse is an Eligible Non-Borrowing Spouse on a reverse mortgage?

item.title: How to Refinance an Inherited Reverse Mortgage
item.description: A guide for heirs on how to pay off an inherited reverse mortgage by refinancing the home into their own name.

item.title: Buying Out Siblings After Inheriting a Reverse Mortgage Home
item.description: How to handle a situation where one sibling wants to keep the family home and the others want to sell.

item.title: Can Children Stop a Parent From Getting a Reverse Mortgage?
item.description: Do adult children have the legal right to block a parent from obtaining a reverse mortgage on their home?

item.title: Reverse Mortgages in Trust: Can You Hold the Home in a Revocable Trust?
item.description: Learn the FHA rules for keeping your home in a Living Trust while obtaining a reverse mortgage.

item.title: The True Cost of Compounding Interest Over 20 Years
item.description: See the actual math behind how compounding interest affects a reverse mortgage balance over a 20-year retirement.

item.title: Paying Off Credit Card Debt with a Reverse Mortgage
item.description: Is it a good idea to use home equity to eliminate high-interest credit card debt? Pros and cons explained.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages and Bankruptcy: What You Need to Know
item.description: How filing for Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy affects an existing reverse mortgage, and vice versa.

item.title: Asset Protection: Can Reverse Mortgage Proceeds Be Garnished?
item.description: Can creditors seize the funds from your reverse mortgage line of credit? Understand your asset protection rights.

item.title: How a Reverse Mortgage Affects Medicare Part B Premiums
item.description: Learn how reverse mortgage proceeds bypass the IRMAA surcharge and keep your Medicare Part B premiums low.

item.title: Deducting Reverse Mortgage Interest on Your Tax Return
item.description: Can you write off the interest charged on a reverse mortgage? We explain the IRS rules for deductibility.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages vs. Capital Gains Tax When Selling
item.description: Understand how capital gains taxes work if you decide to sell a home that has an active reverse mortgage on it.

item.title: How Reverse Mortgages Affect Social Security Benefits
item.description: Will taking out a reverse mortgage reduce or suspend your Social Security retirement benefits? We explain the rules.

item.title: Are Reverse Mortgage Proceeds Taxable?
item.description: Learn why the IRS does not consider reverse mortgage proceeds as income and how this affects your annual tax return.

item.title: Understanding the Lender's Margin on a Reverse Mortgage
item.description: Learn what the lender's margin is, how it affects your compounding interest, and how to negotiate a better rate.

item.title: What is a Life Expectancy Set-Aside (LESA)?
item.description: Understand how a LESA works in a reverse mortgage, why lenders require it, and how it impacts your available cash.

item.title: HECM for Purchase: Buying a New Home with a Reverse Mortgage
item.description: Learn how the HECM for Purchase program allows seniors to buy a new home and secure a reverse mortgage in a single transaction.

item.title: Will a Reverse Mortgage Affect My Medicaid or SSI Benefits?
item.description: How reverse mortgage proceeds are treated by government assistance programs, and how to avoid losing your Medicaid eligibility.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage Scams: 5 Red Flags to Watch Out For
item.description: Learn how to spot predatory lending tactics, contractor fraud, and common reverse mortgage scams targeting seniors.

item.title: What Happens to a Reverse Mortgage When You Die?
item.description: A step-by-step guide for heirs navigating a reverse mortgage after the borrower passes away.

item.title: The Non-Borrowing Spouse: Protections and Risks
item.description: What happens if one spouse is under 62? Learn about Eligible Non-Borrowing Spouse protections in a reverse mortgage.

item.title: Texas Reverse Mortgages: Constitutional Restrictions Explained
item.description: Why getting a reverse mortgage in Texas is different due to the Texas Constitution's strict home equity laws.

item.title: California Reverse Mortgage Laws: The 7-Day Cooling Off Period
item.description: Understanding California's strict consumer protection laws for reverse mortgages, including mandatory cooling-off periods.

item.title: Reverse Mortgages in Florida: State-Specific Rules and Costs
item.description: A guide to getting a reverse mortgage in Florida, including state documentary stamp taxes and homestead exemptions.

item.title: HELOC vs. Reverse Mortgage: Comparing Home Equity Options
item.description: Understand the critical differences between a Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) and a reverse mortgage for seniors.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage vs. Downsizing: Which is Better for Retirement?
item.description: An objective comparison of taking out a reverse mortgage versus selling your home and downsizing to fund retirement.

item.title: Can You Pay Off a Reverse Mortgage Early? (Prepayment Penalties)
item.description: Exploring your rights to repay a reverse mortgage early and why there are no prepayment penalties.

item.title: Proprietary (Jumbo) Reverse Mortgages: Costs and Differences
item.description: How the costs of a private, jumbo reverse mortgage differ from a federally-insured HECM for high-value homes.

item.title: The Hidden 'Cost': Property Taxes and Homeowners Insurance
item.description: Why you must continue to pay property taxes and insurance on a reverse mortgage, and what happens if you default.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage Servicing Fees: Are They Still Charged?
item.description: An explanation of monthly servicing fees on reverse mortgages and why most lenders in 2024 have eliminated them.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage Interest Rates: Fixed vs. Variable
item.description: How interest rates work on a reverse mortgage, the difference between fixed and adjustable rates, and how it impacts your loan balance.

item.title: Title, Recording, and Closing Fees on a Reverse Mortgage
item.description: A breakdown of the third-party closing costs associated with a reverse mortgage, including title insurance and recording fees.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage Counseling: Costs and What to Expect
item.description: Learn about mandatory HUD counseling for reverse mortgages, how much it costs, and why it is a crucial consumer protection step.

item.title: The Upfront MIP: Decoding the HECM Mortgage Insurance Premium
item.description: A detailed explanation of the 2% upfront FHA Mortgage Insurance Premium, why it exists, and how it protects you.

item.title: Reverse Mortgage Appraisal Costs: Expected Fees in 2024
item.description: Everything you need to know about FHA appraisal requirements, costs, and the dreaded 'second appraisal' rule.

item.title: Understanding HECM Origination Fees: What You Actually Pay
item.description: A deep dive into how reverse mortgage origination fees are calculated by HUD, state caps, and how to negotiate them.
